components.see_notes: Basic ECC/EDAC in software; SEE sensitivity depends on memory tech.
components.latchup_notes: No formal latchup test reported (v1 example).
components.shielding_assumptions: Assume ~2mm Al equivalent shielding at PCB enclosure.
components.heritage_notes: Demo heritage in LEO educational missions.

components.see_notes: Large NAND storage increases susceptibility to SEU; consider EDAC and scrubbing.
components.latchup_notes: Latchup testing not available in v1 seed.

components.see_notes: RF front-end may degrade with TID; performance margin recommended.
components.latchup_notes: Latchup risk unknown; current-limited supply recommended.
components.shielding_assumptions: Assume ~2mm Al eq shielding; sensitive parts near outer panel.
components.heritage_notes: Limited heritage in smallsat LEO programs (v1 seed).

components.see_notes: Star tracker processing can be sensitive to SEUs; watchdogs recommended.
components.latchup_notes: Latchup mitigated via current limiting on sensitive rails (v1 seed).

components.see_notes: Battery gauge IC may experience SEU; periodic resets recommended.
components.latchup_notes: Requires latchup protection on battery charge path (v1 seed).

components.see_notes: Mitigation component; does not increase TID rating directly in this schema.
components.shielding_assumptions: Adds ~1-2mm Al eq locally depending on configuration.
